creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since mairix 0.17, bzip2 and gzip compression has been supported.  The current FreeBSD port of mail/mairix does not allow a user to enable/disable these options.

Fix: The attached patch provides the user an option to enable gzip, bzip2, or both.  These options are disabled by default.

Redports logs are here:
https://redports.org/~gjb/20120615170316-12836-30272/mairix-0.22.log
https://redports.org/~gjb/20120615170316-12836-30273/mairix-0.22.log
